threads.subject: Re: Brand Collaboration Inquiry
threads.content: Hi! Thanks for reaching out. I'm interested in collaborating with your brand. My rate for a dedicated video is $500. Let me know if that works for you.

threads.subject: Re: Budget Discussion
threads.content: Hi Celia, thanks for your reply! $500 is a bit over our budget for this campaign. Would you consider $350? We can also offer free product samples worth $200.

threads.subject: Re: Budget Discussion
threads.content: I understand the budget constraint. How about we meet in the middle at $400? And I would love to try your samples before creating content. Can you ship to my address in LA?

threads.subject: Sample Shipment Confirmation
threads.content: Hi Celia! The samples have been shipped to your LA address. Tracking number: 1Z999AA1234567890. Estimated delivery: April 28. Please confirm once received!

threads.subject: Re: Sample Shipment Confirmation
threads.content: Samples received! Love the packaging and the product quality. I will start filming next week. What are the key talking points you want me to highlight?

threads.subject: Re: Key Talking Points
threads.content: Got it, I will focus on the natural ingredients and the lightweight feel. Video should be ready by May 14. Will send you a preview before posting. Excited to work with you!

threads.subject: Interested in partnership
threads.content: Hey team, I've been following your brand and would love to explore a partnership. My audience is mostly fitness enthusiasts, 200k followers on TikTok.

threads.subject: Re: Interested in partnership
threads.content: Hi Mike! Great to hear from you. Our fitness line would be a perfect fit. Our standard rate is $300 per video. Let me know your thoughts!

threads.subject: Re: Re: Interested in partnership
threads.content: $300 works for me! Can you send over the product details and samples? I have a few video ideas already.

threads.subject: Samples on the way + Product Info
threads.content: Samples shipped! Here is the product info deck. Key ingredients: whey protein isolate, organic cocoa. Looking forward to your content!

threads.subject: Re: Samples on the way
threads.content: Still waiting for the samples, tracking shows it is stuck in customs. Can you check on your end? I want to start filming ASAP.

threads.subject: Collaboration offer
threads.content: Hi, I received your DM on TikTok. Yes I'm open to collaboration! My rate is $800 for a review + tutorial video (usually 3-5 min).

threads.subject: Re: Collaboration offer
threads.content: Hi Siti! We love your content. Budget-wise, we can do $650 - our campaign has multiple creators so the budget is split. Is that okay?

threads.subject: Re: Re: Collaboration offer
threads.content: $650 is acceptable! Please send over the product and a brief. Also, when is the deadline for posting?

threads.subject: Product shipped + Campaign brief
threads.content: Hi Siti! Product shipped via DHL. Deadline is June 15. Brief attached. Please confirm once you receive the package!

threads.subject: Re: Product shipped
threads.content: Package received but one item (the serum) was leaking. Can you send a replacement? The other products are fine.

threads.subject: Brand deal inquiry
threads.content: Hi! Interested in your brand. I have 150k followers, mostly 18-25 female. What are your partnership terms?

threads.subject: Re: Brand deal inquiry
threads.content: Great fit! Our campaign pays $450 per video with product gifting. We love your aesthetic. Ready to proceed?

threads.subject: Content draft for review
threads.content: Here is my first draft video for the Glossier campaign! Let me know if any changes needed before I post.

threads.subject: Posted! Here is the link
threads.content: Video is live! The engagement is great so far, 10k views in the first hour! Will share the analytics later.

threads.subject: Re: Brand partnership opportunity
threads.content: Thanks for the DM! I'd love to learn more about your brand and what kind of collaboration you're thinking of. My audience is mainly tech gadget reviewers.

threads.subject: Re: Re: Brand partnership opportunity
threads.content: Great! We are launching a new smart home device and think your audience would love it. What is your typical rate for a product review video?

threads.subject: Interested in K-beauty collab
threads.content: Hello! I specialize in K-beauty reviews, 500k followers. Interested in your new skincare line. My rate is $1200 per video.

threads.subject: Re: Interested in K-beauty collab
threads.content: $1200 is significantly above our budget. Can we negotiate? Our typical rate is $300-$600 for this campaign.

threads.subject: Re: Re: Interested in K-beauty collab
threads.content: I understand, but $1200 is my minimum. Maybe we can revisit this in the future if your budget opens up. Best of luck!

threads.subject: Fitness campaign inquiry
threads.content: Hi Nike team, I would love to be part of your upcoming campaign. I have 800k followers in the fitness niche.

threads.subject: Campaign confirmed + Next steps
threads.content: We are happy to confirm you for the Summer 2026 campaign! Rate: $2000. Contract attached. Please sign and return.

threads.subject: Re: Campaign confirmed
threads.content: Signed contract attached. Video is posted and performing well! 200k views in 3 days. Thanks for the opportunity!

threads.subject: Re: Organic skincare collab
threads.content: Hi! Thanks for reaching out. Your organic skincare line looks amazing. I would be happy to create content. What is your budget?

threads.subject: Re: Re: Organic skincare collab
threads.content: We typically offer $350 per video. We also provide a full product kit ($150 value) and affiliate commission on sales.

threads.subject: Re: Re: Re: Organic skincare collab
threads.content: $350 sounds fair! Can we do $400 for two videos instead? I can do one review and one tutorial. Also interested in the affiliate program.
